title: The Stolen Artifact
shortStory: A priceless artifact was taken from a sealed museum exhibit.

locations.name: Main Hall
locations.teaserText: The grand hall shows signs of movement.

actions.label: Scan the floor
actions.description: Look for items dropped on the floor.
actions.observationText: Debris was scattered {movementWord} across the marble floor.

actions.label: Search the alcoves
actions.observationText: The alcoves are dusty but hold no clues.

actions.label: Talk to the guard
actions.description: Ask what they noticed during rounds.
actions.observationText: The guard heard something shift near closing time.

locations.name: Exhibit Room
locations.teaserText: The exhibit floor has fresh scuffs.

actions.label: Measure the scuffs
actions.description: Check the scuff marks on the floor.
actions.observationText: Mid-sized scuffs mark the floor near the exhibit.

sizeOverrides.small: Small, light scuffs near the display base.
sizeOverrides.large: Heavy scuffs mark the floor around the exhibit.

actions.label: Follow the trail
actions.observationText: A trace of {textureWord} leads away from the exhibit.

actions.label: Photograph the floor
actions.observationText: The photo shows the pattern clearly but adds nothing.

actions.label: Check under the shelves
actions.observationText: The {groundWord} in the vault has been disturbed.

actions.label: Check the high cabinets
actions.observationText: The high cabinets are dusty but untouched.

actions.label: Listen for echoes
actions.observationText: The vault is silent. No one is here.

locations.name: Security Office
locations.teaserText: The security panel was tampered with.

actions.label: Inspect the panel
actions.description: Check how the panel was forced.
actions.observationText: The security panel has fresh scoring around its edge.

actions.label: Smell the panel
actions.observationText: It smells of electronics and dust. Nothing stands out.

actions.label: Check the desk
actions.observationText: Whoever reached the panel left traces {movementWord} along the desk.

locations.name: Rooftop
locations.teaserText: The rooftop guard has a curious memory.

actions.label: Interview the rooftop guard
actions.observationText: The guard is tired but certain about that memory.

actions.label: Check the drainpipe
actions.description: Inspect the ground near the pipe.
actions.observationText: Even near the drainpipe, a line of {textureWord} stayed behind.

actions.label: Check the rooftop shed
actions.observationText: The shed is empty and holds nothing useful.

cookie-crumbs.title: Debris
cookie-crumbs.clueText: Tiny fragments were scattered {movementWord} across the hall.

low-crumbs.title: Trace Fragments
low-crumbs.clueText: Small particles fell {movementWord} beside the exhibit.

quiet-digging.title: Faint Scraping
quiet-digging.clueText: The guard heard a faint scraping near the exhibit.

small-tracks.clueText: Small marks pressed into the museum floor {movementWord}.

sand-trail.title: Display Dust
sand-trail.clueText: A trace of {textureWord} led between the displays.

loose-soil.title: Floor Disturbance
loose-soil.clueText: The {groundWord} near the display base showed disturbance.

scratch-marks.title: Display Score Marks
scratch-marks.clueText: Fine score marks circled the display case lock.

static-mark.clueText: A faint scorch mark blackened the edge of the display case.

metal-shaving.clueText: Thin curls of metal were found near the display lock.

dry-trail.title: Dry Trace
dry-trail.clueText: A line of {textureWord} led away from the exhibit hall.

ash-scatter.title: Display Dust
ash-scatter.clueText: A dusting of {textureWord} settled near the display case.

frost-trail.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} shimmered on the museum floor.

pollen-scent.clueText: The air carried a strange hint of {textureWord}.

slime-trail.clueText: A slick ribbon of {textureWord} traced across the gallery floor.

feather-drift.clueText: A few specks of {textureWord} drifted down near the artifact.
